C:\\.cis_description: Ensure 'Access Credential Manager as a trusted caller' is set to 'No One'
C:\\.nist_description: Access Enforcement — enforce approved authorizations for logical access

C:\\Windows.cis_description: Ensure discretionary access control list on Windows directory is restricted
C:\\Windows.nist_description: Least Functionality — configure to provide only essential capabilities

C:\\Program Files.cis_description: Ensure access to Program Files directories is restricted
C:\\Program Files.nist_description: Least Privilege — employ the principle of least privilege

C:\\Users.cis_description: Ensure Users directory ACL restricts non-admin write access

C:\\Scripts.cis_description: Ensure script execution directories restrict unauthorized write
C:\\Scripts.nist_description: Configuration Settings — establish and document configuration settings

default.cis_description: Ensure Windows Firewall is enabled for all share profiles
default.nist_description: Boundary Protection — monitor and control communications at boundaries

new_share.cis_description: Ensure SMB share access rights are restricted to authorized users only
new_share.nist_description: Remote Access — establish and document remote access to information systems

Administrators.cis_description: Ensure membership of Administrators group is limited to authorized accounts
Administrators.nist_description: Account Management — manage information system accounts

Remote Desktop Users.cis_description: Ensure 'Allow log on through Remote Desktop Services' is controlled
Remote Desktop Users.nist_description: Remote Access — establish usage restrictions for remote access

Backup Operators.cis_description: Ensure 'Back up files and directories' user right is restricted
Backup Operators.nist_description: Least Privilege — restrict backup operator membership

default.cis_description: Ensure service accounts do not use privileged or domain admin credentials
default.nist_description: Authenticator Management — manage information system authenticators

high_privilege.cis_description: Ensure services running as SYSTEM have explicit approval
high_privilege.nist_description: Least Privilege — ensure services run with minimum required privileges
